LAW AND MOTION, 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF PAULA SAVAGE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. IT IS PROCEDURALLY DEFECTIVE IN THAT IT SEEKS SUMMARY JUDGMENT BUT THE PAPERS ARE DIRECTED ONLY B&P 7031 CAUSE OF ACTION. THAT REQUIRES A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. SEE GONZALAS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1987) 189 CAL.APP.3RD 1542. PLAINTIFF'S ORIGINAL SEPARATE STATEMENT FAILS TO DISCLOSE THE AMOUNT PAID. ABSENT THE CONSENT OF DFENDANT, THE SUPPLEMENTAL STATEMENT CANNOT CURE THIS DEFECT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR# 9225 (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Continued To Jun-02-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-21-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Continued To Apr-26-07 At 08:00 A.M. In Dept 501

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Cathleen Curl, Esq. of Manos & Curl, 650-871-5955 for plaintiff and moving party Paula Savage
Richard Whaley, Esq., 719-473-3232 for defendant and opposing party Jonathan Kissee

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF PAULA SAVAGE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. IT IS PROCEDURALLY DEFECTIVE IN THAT IT SEEKS SUMMARY JUDGMENT BUT THE PAPERS ARE DIRECTED ONLY B&P 7031 CAUSE OF ACTION. THAT REQUIRES A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. SEE GONZALAS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1987) 189 CAL.APP.3RD 1542. PLAINTIFF'S ORIGIANL SEPARATE STATEMENT FAILS TO DISCLOSE THE AMOUNT PAID. ABSENT THE CONSENT OF DFENDANT, THE SUPPLEMENTAL STATEMENT CANNOT CURE THIS DEFECT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Set For Trial On May-14-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-25-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
